subject: Hatsune Miku in a black and pink frilled dress costume, posing against a magenta background
description: A figure with long teal twin-tail pigtails wears a black and pink frilled dress with long black gloves, standing in a poised pose against a vivid magenta-pink background. The costume features layered ruffles, pink trim, and a short skirt silhouette. The figure's distinctive teal twintail hairstyle and the card title confirm this as Hatsune Miku in the 'Honey Whip' costume variant. Resolution is limited at 400px; fine costume details are present but not fully legible.
foreground: Figure in black-and-pink frilled dress with teal twintails, posed elegantly
